prompt: Implement FullyAssociativeTLB in model.py with LRU replacement. lookup(va) returns the translated physical address or None and refreshes recency on a hit. insert(vpn, ppn) updates an existing mapping or evicts the LRU mapping when full. invalidate removes a VPN. Preserve page offsets and support only positive entry counts and power-of-two page sizes.
instruction: Implement FullyAssociativeTLB in model.py with LRU replacement. lookup(va) returns the translated physical address or None and refreshes recency on a hit. insert(vpn, ppn) updates an existing mapping or evicts the LRU mapping when full. invalidate removes a VPN. Preserve page offsets and support only positive entry counts and power-of-two page sizes.
